provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, young reptilian alien with slate-grey scales and a training scar across the snout that he clearly got before earning the right to real combat, small undeveloped crest, amber eyes trying to look fierce, wearing a basic cured hide vest with crude stitching where he repaired it himself, no house markings but a leather cord around one wrist that might be a personal token, bare clawed feet, a simple practice blade in a worn sheath, the tail twitches with barely contained energy
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Same species anatomy issue. Not reptilian enough.
